cases.label: Startup due-diligence
cases.blurb: VC evaluating a seed-stage deep-tech startup — do the product claims hold up, and should we invest?
cases.query: Act as a Venture Capitalist. I've uploaded the investment and technical files for a startup we are evaluating. Please run a deep due-diligence report on their core technology and market claims. Verify whether their product claims are scientifically valid, and give us a recommendation on whether we should invest in this startup at this $5M seed stage.

cases.label: School phone-ban policy
cases.blurb: School principal weighing a strict smartphone ban — are the viral parent-guide claims scientifically true?
cases.query: I am a school principal trying to decide if we should enforce a strict smartphone ban. I've uploaded some feedback from our teachers and a viral guide that parents keep sending me. Can you use the internet and academic research to verify if the claims in this parent guide are scientifically true, and give me a realistic policy recommendation based on the data?
